name: cad-spec-gen
description: CAD pipeline skill: design doc → design review → structured spec → feature extraction → constraint declaration → code generation + parts library geometry quality → assembly validation (GATE-3.5) → 2D drawings (GB/T section views, position dims) → 3D renders → photorealistic images (4 backends: gemini/fal/comfyui/engineering)

skills.name: CAD Pipeline Assistant
skills.description: Natural-language assistant for the CAD rendering pipeline (17 intents: env check, config validation, next-step recommendation, materials, camera, exploded view, rendering, AI enhancement/enhance-check/enhance-review, project-guide, photo3d contract gate/autopilot/action/handoff/run/deliver/recover, render-visual-check, render-quality-check, troubleshooting, file structure, status, cross-model integration, BOM/parts/model library, CAD spec, codegen, design review). Photo3D gate status is pass/warning/blocked; later enhancement delivery status is accepted/preview/blocked. It writes PROJECT_GUIDE.json, PHOTO3D_REPORT.json, RENDER_VISUAL_REGRESSION.json, RENDER_QUALITY_REPORT.json, PHOTO3D_AUTOPILOT.json, ACTION_PLAN.json, LLM_CONTEXT_PACK.json, PHOTO3D_ACTION_RUN.json, PHOTO3D_HANDOFF.json, PHOTO3D_RUN.json, ENHANCEMENT_REPORT.json with quality_summary, ENHANCEMENT_REVIEW_REPORT.json with semantic_material_review, and DELIVERY_PACKAGE.json; project-guide is read-only and selects the next safe init/spec/codegen/build-render/photo3d-run handoff without scanning directories or mutating pipeline state; render-visual-check verifies active-run views, render files, assembly instances, optional per-view instance evidence, and accepted baseline consistency; render-quality-check verifies Blender preflight and active-run screenshot pixel_metrics without scanning directories; when ready_for_enhancement it can expose provider_choice, ordinary_user_options, provider_wizard, and provider_health for allowlisted preview-only provider selection plus safe config health status; action plans use run-aware photo3d-recover commands; photo3d-run loops to the next user decision without accepting baseline or running enhancement; photo3d-handoff previews by default and only with --confirm executes recognized current next actions without scanning directories or trusting arbitrary argv, and --provider-preset chooses an allowlisted enhancement provider preset; enhance-check validates explicit render_dir outputs and deterministic multi-view quality without scanning directories; enhance-review ingests explicit human/LLM semantic/material review evidence from --review-input, binds source report paths/hashes to active_run_id, writes ENHANCEMENT_REVIEW_REPORT.json, does not call AI, and does not scan directories; photo3d-deliver builds the active-run final delivery package only from accepted enhancement evidence with accepted quality_summary and, when --require-semantic-review is used or same-run review exists, accepted semantic_material_review; accept-baseline records accepted_baseline_run_id for foolproof user and LLM recovery flows.

skills.name: CAD Spec Generator
skills.description: Phase 1: Extract 9 categories of structured data from design documents into CAD_SPEC.md. v2.5: §6.3 per-part positioning, §6.4 envelope dimensions, §9.1 assembly exclusions. v2.7: §9.2 constraint declarations auto-derived from connection matrix (contact/stack_on/fit codes H7/m6). v2.9: §6.4 envelope attribution via stateful SectionWalker (cad_spec_section_walker.py) with 4-tier hybrid matching (Tier 0 part_no regression guard / Tier 1 structured pattern / Tier 2 CJK+ASCII subsequence / Tier 3 Jaccard). Cross-module priority P1>P2>P4>P3>P7>P5/P6 enforced with granularity tagging (station_constraint vs part_envelope) and end-to-end adapter rejection. v2.22.1: DESIGN_REVIEW.json preserves geometry groups/candidates/A-E quality; structured model_choices supplements apply user STEP files to std_parts/user_provided and parts_library.yaml; cad-skill-setup can generate Codex SKILL.md files. Subsystem-configurable via SectionWalker kwargs (trigger_terms/station_patterns/axis_label_default). Walker 是唯一的 P2 提取路径（v2.10.0 移除 legacy regex fallback 和 feature flag）。Supports --review mode: mechanical(A1-A3)/assembly(B1-B12)/material(C1-C3)/geometry/completeness(D) checks → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → user iterate / auto-fill (--auto-fill) / proceed → CAD_SPEC.md. New --out-dir flag redirects subsystem output for tests.

skills.name: CAD Code Generator
skills.description: Phase 2: Generate CadQuery scaffolds (params.py, build_all.py, assembly.py, part modules, std_*.py standard parts) from CAD_SPEC.md using 5 Jinja2 generators (gen_params/gen_build/gen_parts/gen_assembly/gen_std_parts). v2.5: consumes §6.3 part positions, §6.4 envelopes, §9.1 assembly exclusions. v2.7: consumes §9.2 constraints (contact/stack_on positioning, fit codes), gen_parts reads §6.4 as Priority 0 geometry source, gen_std_parts reads §6.4 for accurate purchased part sizing. v2.21.2: PartsResolver modes inspect/probe/export/codegen, GeometryDecision/ResolveResult A-E quality contract, geometry_report.json from codegen decisions, user STEP mappings, SW Toolbox read-only inspect/probe. v2.7.1: fix assembly positioning — z_is_top group sequential stacking (no overlap), bottom-at-Z=0 auto-stack formula (no gaps), orphan detection with positioned children, seed from occupied-extent boundary. GATE-3.5: assembly_validator.py post-build geometry sanity checks (5 formulas F1-F5). 4-gate pipeline: GATE-1(review)→GATE-2(TODO scan)→GATE-3(orientation)→GATE-3.5(assembly validation).

skills.name: AI Enhancement (4 backends)
skills.description: Phase 5: Enhance Blender-rendered PNG to photorealistic JPG via 4 backends — gemini (cloud AI, ~$0.02/img, soft geometry lock), fal (fal.ai Flux ControlNet, ~$0.20/img, hard depth+canny lock), comfyui (local GPU ControlNet, free, hard lock), engineering (Blender PBR direct→JPG, free, perfect geometry). Auto-detect priority: FAL_KEY→fal, ComfyUI running→comfyui, gemini config→gemini, else→engineering. Fallback chain: fal→gemini→engineering (batch-locked after downgrade). CLI: --backend gemini|fal|comfyui|engineering. v2.3: view-aware material emphasis (Fresnel/specular/diffuse per camera angle), unified appearance data source (MATERIAL_PRESETS only, no duplicate _PRESET_APPEARANCE), auto-derive material descriptions from material_type fallback. v2.1: multi-view consistency — viewpoint lock (auto azimuth/elevation), image role separation (source first), V1-anchor reference, source high-fidelity. Layout-aware prompt routing (radial/linear/custom).

skills.name: Parametric Mechanical Design
skills.description: Manual parametric mechanical subsystem workflow: params.py → CadQuery 3D → GB/T 2D drawings → Blender rendering → AI enhancement. 6 phases with sub-command routing. Purchased parts reuse parts_library.yaml real STEP / SW Toolbox / bd_warehouse / PartCAD models before simplified fallback. Use /cad-codegen for automated scaffold generation first.

tools.name: cad_pipeline
tools.description: Unified 6-phase pipeline orchestrator: spec → codegen → build → render → enhance → annotate

tools.name: project_guide
tools.description: Read-only ordinary-user and LLM project guide: writes PROJECT_GUIDE.json, selects the next safe command across init/spec/codegen/build-render/photo3d-run/enhance-check/accept-baseline handoff, and when the active run is ready for enhancement exposes allowlisted provider preset choices, ordinary_user_options with display-ready titles/summaries/setup hints, provider_wizard with UI/LLM steps/default selection/preview actions, provider_health safe availability status, and preview photo3d-handoff --provider-preset commands. It uses explicit subsystem/design-doc/artifact-index inputs, does not scan directories, does not mutate pipeline state, does not run enhancement, does not append --confirm, and does not expose or accept arbitrary backend, URL, API key, endpoint, secret, model, or JSON argv injection.

tools.name: photo3d
tools.description: Contract-driven photorealistic gate: validates current run_id via ARTIFACT_INDEX.json, PRODUCT_GRAPH.json, MODEL_CONTRACT.json, ASSEMBLY_SIGNATURE.json, RENDER_MANIFEST.json, and optional baseline / CHANGE_SCOPE before enhancement. Writes PHOTO3D_REPORT.json, ACTION_PLAN.json, and LLM_CONTEXT_PACK.json; gate status is pass/warning/blocked, while later enhancement delivery status is accepted/preview/blocked.

tools.name: render_visual_check
tools.description: Phase 4 active-run render visual consistency gate: reads ARTIFACT_INDEX.json active_run_id and current PRODUCT_GRAPH.json / ASSEMBLY_SIGNATURE.json / render_manifest.json, compares views, render files, assembly instances, optional per-view instance evidence, and accepted baseline render/assembly evidence, then writes RENDER_VISUAL_REGRESSION.json. It prevents missing views/components, stale render_dir/run_id drift, duplicate view records, and lost per-view instance evidence; it does not scan directories for newest files.

tools.name: render_quality_check
tools.description: Phase 4 active-run Blender preflight and screenshot pixel quality gate: reads ARTIFACT_INDEX.json active_run_id and same-run render_manifest.json, checks Blender preflight, verifies render file path/hash/QA, computes per-view pixel_metrics, writes RENDER_QUALITY_REPORT.json with blender_preflight and render_quality_summary, warns on low contrast/low edge density/inconsistent canvas, blocks missing Blender or hard render evidence failures, and does not scan directories for newest files.

tools.name: photo3d_autopilot
tools.description: 普通用户 Photo3D autopilot: runs the contract gate from ARTIFACT_INDEX.json active run_id, writes PHOTO3D_REPORT.json and PHOTO3D_AUTOPILOT.json, points blocked runs to ACTION_PLAN.json / LLM_CONTEXT_PACK.json, recommends explicit accept-baseline when pass/warning has no accepted_baseline_run_id, and never scans directories or silently accepts a baseline.

tools.name: photo3d_action
tools.description: Confirmed Photo3D action runner: reads the current active_run_id PHOTO3D_AUTOPILOT.json / ACTION_PLAN.json, previews by default, and only with --confirm executes allowlisted low-risk CLI recovery actions (product-graph/build/render) that need no user input and are encoded as run-aware photo3d-recover commands with --run-id and --artifact-index. Writes PHOTO3D_ACTION_RUN.json, keeps user-input actions for the user, reruns photo3d-autopilot after all confirmed low-risk actions succeed, records the next summary under post_action_autopilot, and never scans directories, runs enhancement, or accepts a baseline.

tools.name: photo3d_handoff
tools.description: Confirmed Photo3D next-action handoff: reads current active_run_id PHOTO3D_RUN.json or PHOTO3D_AUTOPILOT.json, writes PHOTO3D_HANDOFF.json, previews by default, and only with --confirm executes recognized current next actions such as accept-baseline, enhance, enhance-check, or photo3d-run --confirm-actions. It does not scan directories, never trusts arbitrary argv from JSON reports, rebuilds commands from ARTIFACT_INDEX.json and current run/render paths, and keeps output inside the active run directory. For enhance, --provider-preset selects an allowlisted provider preset such as default, engineering, gemini, fal, fal_comfy, or comfyui; after enhance succeeds it automatically runs enhance-check for the same active run, records followup_action, reruns photo3d-run once without confirmation, and writes post_handoff_photo3d_run so accepted/preview/blocked delivery state is visible. Status executed_with_followup means the enhancement and same-run acceptance follow-up completed; unknown presets are blocked instead of executing arbitrary backend/model args.

tools.name: photo3d_run
tools.description: Foolproof Photo3D multi-round guide: runs current active_run_id gate + photo3d-autopilot, writes PHOTO3D_RUN.json, and with --confirm-actions executes only allowlisted low-risk recoveries through photo3d-action. It stops at baseline acceptance, enhancement handoff, user input, manual review, failure, or max-rounds; it does not scan directories, does not accept baseline, and does not run enhancement.

tools.name: photo3d_deliver
tools.description: Active-run Photo3D final delivery package: reads ARTIFACT_INDEX.json active_run_id, same-run render_manifest.json, ENHANCEMENT_REPORT.json quality_summary, optional ENHANCEMENT_REVIEW_REPORT.json semantic_material_review, PHOTO3D_RUN.json, and contract evidence, then writes DELIVERY_PACKAGE.json plus README.md under the current run delivery directory. It copies final enhanced/source/labeled images only when enhancement status and quality_summary are accepted, and when --require-semantic-review is used or same-run review exists, semantic_material_review is accepted. It records final_deliverable, treats preview/blocked as not deliverable by default, records photo_quality_not_accepted or semantic_review_not_accepted when quality or semantic review is not accepted, rejects subsystem/run_id/render_manifest drift, and does not scan directories for newest files.

tools.name: enhancement_review
tools.description: Active-run semantic/material enhancement review ingestion: reads explicit human or LLM --review-input JSON, verifies ARTIFACT_INDEX.json active_run_id plus run_id/subsystem, same-run render_manifest.json and ENHANCEMENT_REPORT.json paths plus sha256 hashes, validates each view has generic semantic checks, writes ENHANCEMENT_REVIEW_REPORT.json with semantic_material_review accepted/preview/needs_review/blocked, does not call AI, does not accept backend/model/key/url settings, and does not scan directories.

tools.name: photo3d_recover
tools.description: Internal run-aware Photo3D recovery wrapper: runs product-graph/build/render only when --run-id matches ARTIFACT_INDEX.json active_run_id, updates current run artifacts, does not scan directories, does not create or switch runs, and is normally invoked through ACTION_PLAN.json plus photo3d-action.

tools.name: enhance_check
tools.description: Run-aware enhancement consistency acceptance: reads an explicit render_manifest.json / render_dir, verifies every manifest view has an enhanced image in the same directory, compares source/enhanced shape and image QA, computes deterministic multi-view quality metrics, writes ENHANCEMENT_REPORT.json with quality_summary, reports accepted/preview/blocked, and does not scan directories for newest files.

tools.name: accept_baseline
tools.description: Accept a pass/warning Photo3D run as the explicit baseline by writing accepted_baseline_run_id to ARTIFACT_INDEX.json without switching active_run_id or scanning directories. Later photo3d --change-scope reuses the accepted ASSEMBLY_SIGNATURE.json unless --baseline-signature overrides it.

tools.name: cad_spec_gen
tools.description: Extract structured CAD spec from Markdown design documents

tools.name: bom_parser
tools.description: Parse BOM tables from design documents into tree/JSON/summary

tools.name: gemini_enhance
tools.description: Image-to-image AI enhancement: Blender PNG → photorealistic JPG (geometry locked). 4 backends: gemini (cloud), fal (fal.ai ControlNet), comfyui (local GPU ControlNet), engineering (Blender PBR direct). Auto-detects best available backend. Use 'python cad_pipeline.py enhance' for integrated workflow with auto-rename.

tools.name: annotate_render
tools.description: Add component labels (CN/EN) to rendered images via PIL. Leader lines + text on semi-transparent background.

pipeline.overview: Design Doc (.md) → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → CAD_SPEC.md (+ feature list + §9.2 constraints) → Jinja2 codegen (+ hole/section gen + constraint positioning) → CadQuery (STEP/DXF/GLB) → GATE-3.5 assembly validation → DXF→PNG (GB/T section views + position dims) → Blender Cycles PNG → AI-enhanced JPG (4 backends: gemini/fal/comfyui/engineering, view-aware materials) → Annotated JPG
stages: Phase 1 SPEC: Design review + spec extraction (cad_spec_gen.py --review). v2.7: extract_assembly_constraints() auto-derives §9.2 constraint declarations (contact/stack_on/fit codes) from connection matrix. GATE-1: CRITICAL issues block Phase 2.

Phase 2 CODEGEN: 5 Jinja2 generators → CadQuery scaffolds + std parts (codegen/gen_*.py). v2.5: gen_assembly.py consumes §6.3/§6.4/§9.1. v2.7: gen_assembly.py consumes §9.2 constraints (contact/stack_on positioning, exclude_stack exclusion); gen_parts.py reads §6.4 envelopes as Priority 0 geometry source; gen_std_parts.py reads §6.4 for accurate purchased part sizing. v2.7.1: _resolve_child_offsets() fixes — z_is_top deferred group stacking, bottom-at-Z=0 auto-stack formula, orphan detection via has_positioned_children, seed from occupied-extent boundary. GATE-2: gen_parts.py scans TODO markers → exit(2) if unfilled.

Phase 3 BUILD: GATE-3: orientation_check.py asserts bounding-box principal axes vs design-doc → blocks build on FAIL. Then: parametric modeling → STEP + DXF + GLB (build_all.py). GATE-3.5 (v2.7): assembly_validator.py post-build geometry sanity checks — 5 formulas (F1 overlap, F2 disconnect, F3 compactness, F4 size ratio, F5 exclusion compliance) with spec-derived thresholds → ASSEMBLY_REPORT.json (PASS/WARN/FAIL per check). Post-build: auto-runs render_dxf.py to convert DXF → PNG.

Phase 4 RENDER: Blender Cycles N-view PNG from render_config.json camera dict (dynamic, not hardcoded). render_3d.py + render_exploded.py + render_section.py dispatched by view type. Post-render: writes render_manifest.json (session-new files only, partial flag on partial failure) and V*_labels.json sidecar (Blender world_to_camera_view projected anchor coords per component).

Phase 5 ENHANCE: AI enhancement → photorealistic JPG via 4 backends: gemini (cloud, ~$0.02/img, soft geometry lock via prompt), fal (fal.ai Flux ControlNet, ~$0.20/img, hard depth+canny lock), comfyui (local GPU ControlNet, free, hard lock), engineering (Blender PBR direct→JPG, free, perfect geometry). Auto-detect priority: FAL_KEY→fal, ComfyUI running→comfyui, gemini config→gemini, else→engineering. Fallback chain: fal→gemini→engineering (batch-locked after downgrade). CLI: --backend gemini|fal|comfyui|engineering on enhance and full commands. v2.3: MATERIAL_PRESETS appearance field is single source of truth (removed duplicate _PRESET_APPEARANCE); view-aware material emphasis per camera angle; material_type→preset auto-fallback from params.py. Auto-enriches rc from params.py via prompt_data_builder (in-memory). Material bridging: resolve_bom_materials() builds bom_id→component→material lookup chain. Reads render_manifest.json for session-new PNGs.

Phase 6 ANNOTATE: Component labels CN/EN (annotate_render.py). Reads V*_labels.json sidecar for geometrically accurate anchor coords (Blender-projected); falls back to render_config.json hardcoded coords when no sidecar present.
